category_title: Quietly observant students who listen to stories or watch peers solve math problems
scenario_title: Watching a peer complete a long-division problem
minimal_context: The student is in the classroom watching a peer complete a long-division problem on an overhead projector.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please pay attention to the overhead projector while your classmate completes this long-division problem.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits along with the rest of the students in the class, watching the peer at the overhead projector.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think about the steps they are taking?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Remains passively engaged, just watching the other student complete the task.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to follow along and write down the answer.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues to show passive engagement, staring straight ahead and watching the peer complete the long-division problem without participating.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please pay attention to the overhead projector while your classmate completes this long-division problem.

STUDENT: (Sits along with the rest of the students in the class, watching the peer at the overhead projector.)

TUTOR: What do you think about the steps they are taking?

STUDENT: (Remains passively engaged, just watching the other student complete the task.)

TUTOR: Try to follow along and write down the answer.

STUDENT: (Continues to show passive engagement, staring straight ahead and watching the peer complete the long-division problem without participating.)

task.content: Watching a peer complete a long-division problem

context.materials: Overhead projector, visual examples, models of written responses
context.social_setting: Along with the rest of the students in the class

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: In lecture activities and whole-group read-aloud activities, and watching other students complete a task

behavior_patterns.condition: Watching other students complete a task
